note_en: Arena Autopilot — two simulated $10,000 ledgers (Model A: intraday double-window swing; Model B: end-of-day deep review) trading a fixed universe (public/arena-universe.json) under code-enforced risk rules (public/../src/lib/arenaRules.js — the model proposes, the rules engine settles, never the other way around). Not investment advice.
note_zh: Arena Autopilot——两本各 $10,000 的模拟账本（Model A：日内双窗口 swing；Model B：盘后深度复盘），在固定交易域内（public/arena-universe.json）按代码强制的风控规则运作（src/lib/arenaRules.js——模型只提案，规则引擎收单，永远不是反过来）。非投资建议。

review.zh: 第三次定时运行(Day 3)。feida.au/api/quote 连续第三次被沙箱代理拒绝(blocked-by-allowlist)，Chrome 扩展仍未连接，30 个标的依旧无有效 refPx，按不编造报价的红线继续空仓观望，与 Day 1、Day 2 一致。本次调整：与其反复空等，建议下次运行前人工核实该接口的允许清单配置，否则该策略窗口将持续无法产生任何实际决策。新闻面：AI 芯片股延续强势，Micron 年内涨约240%(近一年近7倍)，AMD 年内约+114%跑赢英伟达，英伟达仍占AI加速器约81%份额；7月6日周一三大指数齐涨（标普+0.72%、纳指+1.12%），科技板块领涨，但市场对估值泡沫的担忧仍存(Michael Burry等)。
review.en: Day 3 run. feida.au/api/quote was blocked (blocked-by-allowlist) for a third consecutive run, and no Chrome browser is connected, so no valid refPx exists for any of the 30 symbols. Proposing zero orders again per the no-fabrication rule. One concrete adjustment: flagging that the quote endpoint's allowlist config needs a manual check, since this decision window has now produced no real trades three times running. Context: AI chip names remain strong (Micron +240% YTD), AMD +114% YTD outpacing Nvidia; S&P/Nasdaq both rose Monday July 6 on broad tech strength, though bubble concerns persist.

review.zh: 尚未开仓——V3 刚上线，等待 V4 定时任务首次运行。
review.en: No trades yet — V3 just shipped, awaiting V4's first scheduled run.
